titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/277

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=252 status=live modified=2017-03-29 12:00:46.786347+00 | translation moa=253 status=live modified=2017-03-29 12:00:50.171666+00

div.p:
Omnibus hoc scriptum uisuris uel audituris . Donecanus Comes de . Carrick . Salutem. Sciatis nos dedisse
Concessisse . ⁊ hac presenti Carta nostra confirmasse . deo et ecclesie beate Marie de . Norberewic . et Mo
nialibus ibidem deo seruientibus et in perpetuum seruituris tres marchas argenti percipiendas annuatim de terra
de . Barrebeth . ad duos terminos . scilicet medietatem ad festum Pentecostes . et medietatem ad festum sancti Mar
tini quousque eis in loco conpetenti prouiderimus de duobus penilandis et dimidiam . Et ut hec nostra donacio
et concessio . et carte nostre confirmacio rata et stabilis permaneat  presens scriptum eisdem tradidimus
sigillo nostro roboratum. Hiis testibus . domino Iohanne milite filio Comitis . Magsitro Hugone . Alano
Decano . Murthac’ senescallo et multis aliis.

To all who shall view or hear this deed, Duncan Earl of Carrick sends Greeting: Know that we have given, granted, and by this our present charter made firm, to God and to the church of Blessed Mary in North Berwick, and to the monks serving God there, and in perpetuity to those who will serve there, three merks of silver to be received annually from the land of Berbeth, at two terms, that is half at the feast of Pentecost, and half at the feast of St Martin, until we have provided them with two-and-a-half pennylands in a suitable place. And that this our donation and grant, and the confirmation of our charters remain certain and constant, we have handed over the present deed to the same, secured with our seal. With these witnesses, the lord John, knight, son of the Earl, Master Hugh, Alan the dean, Mudoch the steward, and many others.
